pages.title: About Oliver | The Rt Hon Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP
pages.h1: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP
pages.meta_description: I am Hertfordshire through and through. I was born in Park Street and grew up in Bricket Wood. Dad worked in a wire factory in Watford and Mum still works locally in London Colney.I went to Parmiters’ School near Watford and then won a place to read law at Cambridge University. After working as a teacher in Japan, I resumed my legal training and worked in the City.
headings: h3: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere
pages.text_excerpt: About Oliver | The Rt Hon Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Skip to main content The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere Main navigation Home About Oliver News Campaigns About Hertsmere Contact Surgeries About Oliver Tweet Hertsmere is my home patch. I was born and grew up here and still live in the area with my wife and two young children. I went to Parmiter’s School near Watford and then won a place to study law at Cambridge University. From 2010 until 2015 I served in Downing Street, advising the then Prime Minister on how to tackle the wide variety of challenges confronting him. I was made a Commander of the Order of the British Empire in recognition of this service. I have used my skills and experience to give Hertsmere a strong voice nationally and get us the best deal. Prior to becoming a member of the Government, my duties included chairing the All-Party Parliamentary Group for British Jews and serving as an officer of the Conservative Friends of Israel. In 2018, it was a privilege to be appointed as Minister for Implementation (Parliamentary Secretary to the Cabinet Office) and I then served in the Cabinet as the Paymaster General and Minister for the Cabinet Office. From February 2020, I was appointed as Secretary of State for Digital, Culture, Media and Sport. In September 2021, I was delighted to be appointed by the Prime Minister as Chairman of the Conservative Party. In June 2022, I resigned from this position and returned to the backbenches. In October 2022 I was delighted to be appointed as Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster by the Prime Minister. I was then deeply honoured in April 2023 to have been asked to serve as Deputy Prime Minister. Following the General Election in July 2024 I was appointed Deputy Leader of the Opposition and Shadow Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster. I am passionate about preserving the things that make Hertsmere such a special place to live and I continue to work locally and nationally to promote my key priorities for the area, including defending our green spaces, delivering better transport and education and supporting the diverse local community. In my spare time, I enjoy pub lunches and countryside walks with my family and our pet dog, Betsy. The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Hertsmere About Oliver Promoted by Harvey Cohen on behalf of Oliver Dowden at 3 Vision House, Station Road, Borehamwood, Hertfordshire, WD6 1DE Copyright 2026 The Rt Hon Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP. pages.text_excerpt: Campaigns | The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Skip to main content The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere Main navigation Home About Oliver News Campaigns About Hertsmere Contact Surgeries Campaigns Defending our Countryside One of the great pleasures of living in our part of Hertfordshire is the countryside we have right on our doorstep. I grew up enjoying our green areas and love... Better Public Transport I have campaigned tirelessly as Hertsmere’s MP to secure vital upgrades to our local transport services. We massively rely on these transport links, both to get... Supporting the Diverse Local Community One of our great strengths in Hertsmere is the diversity of our community locally, and one of the great joys of being Hertsmere’s MP has been making a huge... Improving Education Our local state schools provided me with an excellent education. I will never forget the debt of gratitude that I owe to Parmiters’ School in Watford. The great education I got there enabled me to do so much with my life, whether it was winning a place at Cambridge University, working for the Prime Minister or having the privilege of being elected as a Member of Parliament. Vibrant Local Economy Hertsmere has a vibrant and growing local economy, which I am determined to support wherever I can. We are a world-leading location for film and TV production... Strong Infrastructure As our towns and villages continue to grow, particularly with a new Local Plan being developed, we must get the infrastructure to go with it. During discussions... pages.title: Surgeries | The Rt Hon Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP
pages.h1: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP
pages.meta_description: I regularly hold surgeries around Hertsmere where my constituents can raise issues and concerns directly with me. These are arranged by email and if you wish to book an appointment, please email oliver@oliverdowden.com.
headings: h3: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries | The Rt Hon Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Skip to main content The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere Main navigation Home About Oliver News Campaigns About Hertsmere Contact Surgeries Surgeries Tweet I regularly hold surgeries around Hertsmere where my constituents can raise issues and concerns directly with me. These are arranged by email and if you wish to book an appointment, please email [email protected] . In your message, please make sure you provide your; full name postal address telephone contact number description of what you would like to discuss My office will then be in contact to arrange the next available time. I look forward to seeing you there.
